EventLog.message: 🐲 Toronto Cosmic Dragons vs 🐜 Tiny Silly Little Ants @ Tiny Mini Small Stadium
🐲 Toronto Cosmic Dragons Sidney West vs. 🐜 Tiny Silly Little Ants Isaiah Izquierdo

1. RF Josephine Barnett
2. LF Tiger Segura
3. CF Jaxson Rakotomalala
4. 2B Karina Marques
5. SS Enrique Hester

7. 3B Voicemail He
8. SS Lulu Vazquez
9. 2B Fizz Choc
